title: Expense Reimbursement Process and Submission Deadlines
text:
Q: What is the process for submitting expense reimbursements and what are the deadlines?
A: To submit an expense reimbursement, employees must complete the Expense Reimbursement Form available on the company intranet. All receipts must be attached and clearly labeled with the purpose of the expense. Submissions should be made within 30 days of the expense date to ensure timely processing. Once submitted, reimbursements will typically be processed within two pay cycles. If you miss the 30-day deadline, you may need to provide a justification to your manager for consideration. For any questions or assistance, please contact the Finance Department at finance@company.com or call extension 1234. Remember, all expenses must comply with the company’s expense policy to be eligible for reimbursement.
